title.en: In one sentence, it is to show off!

content.en:
An abyss demon wolf the size of the Ancient Divine Mountain stepped on the cloud steps and quickly came to Ye Tian and the others.

At this time, there were about hundreds of half-step True Ancestor-level powerhouses in this area, and they just happened to encounter this abyss demon wolf, but no one was afraid.

"Little Abyss Demon Wolf, look for death!"

A half-step true ancestor held a half-step spear and slashed at the abyss demon wolf, as if he wanted to show himself and show his powerful strength.

In one sentence, it is to show off!

However, here comes the trouble!

Bang!

The half-path spear stabbed into the body of the Abyss Demon Wolf, making a metallic crashing sound.

At this moment, the half-step True Ancestor completely changed color.

With his strength and the power of the half-path spear, it was enough to easily pierce a half-step true ancestor who had no means of defense, and even a weaker true ancestor would be pierced by a single blow.

But this abyssal demon wolf completely blocked his half-way spear with just his physical defense, what a terrifying defense!

All the half-step True Ancestors were very surprised and couldn't believe this scene.

However, Ye Tian felt that it was very normal, others might not know much about the abyss monsters, but Ye Tian had some understanding.

Abyss monsters are tempered by the abyss demonic qi all the time, coupled with their own physique and abyssal bloodline, their growth is very high, so their bodies are tempered to be extremely terrifying.

It is difficult for a cultivator of the same level to compete with the abyss monster in terms of physique, unless it is the kind of cultivator who is more demonic.

And the half-step True Ancestor just now was actually very ordinary, he was only a top True Monarch in the past, and he was far from qualified to enter the True Monarch List, and his strength was not very strong, so he naturally couldn't deal with this Abyss Demon Wolf.

Wow!

The Abyss Demon Wolf grabbed it with one claw and directly sent the half-step True Ancestor flying.

cough cough cough !!

This half-step True Ancestor was flying upside down in the air, coughing up blood, and his injuries were quite serious, and streams of abyssal demonic qi continued to invade his body, making it difficult for him to recover from his injuries.

When he hit the ground, his entire body suddenly exploded, and his life passed quickly.

He's dead!

At this time, many half-step True Ancestors were shocked, a half-step True Ancestor was actually killed by that Abyss Demon Wolf with a single blow, this was simply terrifying!

Under normal circumstances, even if the difference in strength between the two half-step True Ancestors is a little large, it is difficult to kill them with one blow, but they need to wear out each other's vitality again and again before they can kill each other!

Kill the opponent with one blow, unless the difference in strength is unimaginable.

But just now they could sense that the attack of the Abyss Demon Wolf was not much higher than that half-step True Ancestor, and the real reason for the death of that half-step True Ancestor was the Abyss Demon Qi.

The abyssal demonic qi of the Infinite Abyss contained a terrifying corrosive power, capable of instantly eroding the vitality of a half-step True Ancestor, so once it was severely damaged, it would die almost instantly, and there would be no time to recover at all.

All of a sudden, many half-step True Ancestors were really panicked, and they didn't dare to fight this Abyss Demon Wolf at all.

"Wanfa Daozi is here!"

A half-step True Ancestor spoke up.

Suddenly, one after another looked at Ye Tian.

"Please also ask Wanfa Daozi to kill this abyss demon wolf, we will be grateful!"

"Please also ask Wanfa Daozi to kill this abyss demon wolf, we will be grateful!"

"Please also ask Wanfa Daozi to kill this abyss demon wolf, we will be grateful!"

A half-step True Ancestor pleaded.

Ye Tian casually hit the air with a shock, and then turned around and left, disappearing.

"How did Wanfa Daozi go?"

Many half-step True Ancestors were stunned.

At this time, a half-step True Ancestor noticed the situation of the abyss demon wolf and exclaimed, "Look!"

I saw that the abyssal demon wolf's movements froze, and his body gradually shattered and turned into nothingness.

Hiss!

The audience gasped!

Ye Tian killed such a terrifying Abyss Demon Wolf with a single blow, this kind of strength was terrifying.

"It is worthy of being able to kill the incarnation of the Dao Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws, the strength is too strong!"

A half-step True Ancestor exclaimed.

Immediately, these half-step True Ancestors left separately, but they didn't dare to be too high-profile, but they were cautious one by one, and even after sensing the breath of the abyss monster, they quickly flew away.

Along the way, Ye Tian encountered many abyss monsters, and killed them one after another as long as they encountered them.

Gradually, he had a general understanding of the strength of these abyss monsters.

Most of the abyssal monsters are relatively weak, probably equivalent to the weaker half-step True Ancestor, and there are even a few abyssal monsters that are only equivalent to the True Monarch, and the best of them are comparable to the top half-step True Ancestor.

However, the remnants of the Infinite Abyss Fragment were very large, and Ye Tian did not dare to guarantee that there were no abyss monsters that threatened him here.

But one thing is for sure, there are many good things in the Infinite Abyss Fragment.

Although the number of treasures here is not enough, there are no low-level treasures.

For example, some precious ores can be used to forge Dao weapons, some divine medicines can be used to refine elixirs that improve the strength of true ancestors, and the corpses of some abyss monsters are basically good things, and they are full of treasures.

Although there are many good things, Ye Tian is not very satisfied, what he wants to find most is the treasure of the Convergence Dao, that is the real good thing, once he finds one, then this trip to the Infinite Abyss Fragment Ruins will not be in vain.

------------

Somewhere in the ruins of the Infinite Abyss Shard.

Ten half-step True Ancestors came to an abyssal ruin, where there was an ancient hall.

It stands to reason that there shouldn't be any relics in such an infinite abyss, let alone a hall like a cultivator's foundation.

But these ten half-step True Ancestors did not panic, but were vaguely excited.

"Serendipity!"

They decided that this was a chance, and even guessed that it was the inheritance of some powerful being.

So they broke into the temple.

But soon, disaster began!

"Ahhh!!!hhh

As soon as the ten half-step True Ancestors entered the hall, they encountered a humanoid abyssal monster with two blade forefeet.

One person and one sword, ten half-step true ancestors were only killed by this abyss monster with ten swords.

If these ten half-step true ancestors are ordinary half-step true ancestors, the key is that they are not weak, they have basically reached the extreme of half-step true ancestors, and one of the half-step true ancestors is an official disciple of the Dao Ancestor, and he has also entered the True Monarch List, although he is only at the end, it is enough to prove his strength.

However, this half-step True Ancestor, who was among the top among the large number of Half-Step True Ancestors in the Quasi-Dao Realm, was also killed in one fell swoop, which was enough to prove the terrifying and powerful nature of this abyss monster.

And after the death of these ten half-step True Ancestors, the humanoid abyssal monster with both hands and forefeet spoke, and if they heard this abyssal monster speak, they would definitely not be in disbelief.

Because according to the information, the intelligence of the abyss monster is very low, and everything relies on instinct, and it is impossible to survive.

I saw this abyss monster speak: "Ten half-step true ancestors, it seems that I have successfully reached the alien realm, and the sect master's plan has succeeded! It's a pity that I can't leave the Infinite Abyss Fragment for the time being, and only by becoming a true ancestor can I temporarily get rid of the identity of the abyss monster and completely transform into an abyss nobleman like an abyss lord!"

With that, the abyssal monster fell silent.

It's a pity that no one heard him, otherwise many things would definitely come to mind!
